entry.data:
SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTH AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

CLEAR
HIGHS AROUND 70
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
